indicators.label: Nominal GDP
indicators.description: Gross domestic product at current US-dollar prices.

indicators.label: Real GDP Growth
indicators.description: Annual percentage change in real gross domestic product.

indicators.label: GDP Per Capita
indicators.description: Nominal GDP divided by the mid-year population.

indicators.label: Unemployment Rate
indicators.description: Share of the labour force without work but available for work.

indicators.label: Inflation CPI
indicators.description: Annual percentage change in the consumer price index.

indicators.label: Government Debt
indicators.description: General-government gross debt from IMF/FRED where available; otherwise World Bank central-government debt.

indicators.label: Government Balance
indicators.description: Government net lending or borrowing as a share of GDP.

indicators.label: Current Account Balance
indicators.description: Current-account balance as a share of GDP.

indicators.label: Gross Capital Formation
indicators.description: Gross domestic investment as a share of GDP.

indicators.label: Gross Savings
indicators.description: Gross national savings as a share of GDP.

indicators.label: Trade
indicators.description: Exports plus imports of goods and services as a share of GDP.

indicators.label: Population Growth
indicators.description: Annual percentage change in total population.
